symbols.name: getAnthropicClient
symbols.signature: export async function getAnthropicClient({ apiKey, maxRetries, model, fetchOverride, source }): Promise<Anthropic>
symbols.purpose: Factory creating correct Anthropic SDK client (direct/Bedrock/Foundry/Vertex) based on env vars

symbols.name: queryModel
symbols.signature: async function* queryModel(messages, systemPrompt, thinkingConfig, tools, signal, options): AsyncGenerator<StreamEvent|AssistantMessage>
symbols.purpose: Core streaming request loop: assembles headers, tool schemas, cache breakpoints, dispatches anthropic.beta.messages.create with stream:true

symbols.name: queryModelWithStreaming
symbols.purpose: Public streaming wrapper around queryModel, wired through withStreamingVCR

symbols.name: withRetry
symbols.signature: export async function* withRetry<T>(getClient, operation, options): AsyncGenerator<SystemAPIErrorMessage, T>
symbols.purpose: Generic retry generator: exponential backoff, jitter, OAuth refresh, 529-fallback, persistent unattended retry

symbols.name: connectToServer
symbols.signature: export const connectToServer = memoize(async (name, serverRef, serverStats?)): Promise<MCPServerConnection>
symbols.purpose: Memoized factory connecting MCP server over appropriate transport (stdio/SSE/HTTP/WS/in-process)

symbols.name: fetchToolsForClient
symbols.purpose: LRU-memoized tools/list call, wraps results in MCPTool template with overridden methods

symbols.name: ClaudeAuthProvider
symbols.purpose: OAuth client for MCP SSE/HTTP: keychain tokens, PKCE flows, refresh, XAA token exchange

symbols.name: AgentTool
symbols.purpose: Spawns subagents: sync/async/worktree/remote/teammate based on input params and feature gates

symbols.name: runAgent
symbols.signature: export async function* runAgent({agentDefinition, promptMessages, ...}): AsyncGenerator<Message>
symbols.purpose: Core subagent execution: init MCP servers, build isolated context, call query(), record transcript

symbols.name: MCPTool
symbols.purpose: Template tool for all MCP-backed tools; name/description/call overridden per-server

symbols.name: InProcessTransport
symbols.purpose: Linked transport pair for in-process MCP (Chrome/ComputerUse), avoids 325MB subprocess overhead

symbols.name: WebSearchTool
symbols.purpose: Submits search via queryModelWithStreaming with BetaWebSearchTool20250305 server tool

symbols.name: AgentDefinition
symbols.purpose: Named agent with system prompt, tools, MCP specs, model override, source provenance

patterns.name: Multi-Provider API Client Factory
patterns.description: Single factory dynamically imports 4 SDK clients (Anthropic/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry), all cast to type Anthropic. Callers unaware of provider.

patterns.name: Streaming-First with Non-Streaming Fallback
patterns.description: Primary path always stream:true. 529 mid-stream triggers executeNonStreamingRequest fallback. Idle watchdog (90s) aborts hung streams.

patterns.name: Memoized MCP Connection with Cache-Invalidation Reconnect
patterns.description: connectToServer() memoized. client.onclose deletes cache entries → next call transparently reconnects. Reconnect is a side effect of cache invalidation.

patterns.name: In-Process MCP for Lightweight Servers
patterns.description: Chrome/ComputerUse run in-process via InProcessTransport (queueMicrotask). Saves ~325MB subprocess overhead.

patterns.name: Session-Stable Beta Header Latching
patterns.description: Beta headers latched once activated (fast-mode, AFK, cache-editing). Prevents mid-session cache bust (~50-70K tokens per flip). Cleared on /clear and /compact.

patterns.name: WebSearch as Recursive API Call
patterns.description: WebSearchTool calls queryModelWithStreaming with server-side BetaWebSearchTool20250305. Search is delegated to Anthropic API, not external.

patterns.name: Persistent Unattended Retry with Heartbeat
patterns.description: CLAUDE_CODE_UNATTENDED_RETRY: loops indefinitely on 429/529, yields SystemAPIErrorMessages every 30s as heartbeat to prevent host kill.

patterns.name: FORK_SUBAGENT for Cache-Hit Inheritance
patterns.description: Child agent inherits parent's rendered system prompt bytes (not re-computed) for byte-identical API prefix → prompt cache hit.

surprises: WebSearchTool does not call external search API — recursive queryModelWithStreaming() with server-side BetaWebSearchTool
Chrome/ComputerUse MCP in-process via InProcessTransport — saves 325MB subprocess overhead
MCP reconnect is cache invalidation side effect, not explicit retry
Beta headers latched session-stable to prevent 50-70K token cache bust
Persistent retry yields heartbeat SystemAPIErrorMessages every 30s
AgentTool supports isolation:remote — teleports to CCR cloud container
Streaming idle watchdog uses setTimeout (not AbortSignal.timeout) to avoid Bun memory leak
FORK_SUBAGENT inherits parent rendered system prompt for cache hit
MCP tools are clones from MCPTool template via object spread with closure overrides
